title: RPG Edition
description: FOR RPG AND MINECRAFT FANS ONLY! Just kidding! Everyone can enjoy a more RPG experience inside Minecraft!
body:
# Oops I made a funny mistake. 
I wrote the description in the changelogs section (hahaha), so here it is again and I will fix the changelog as well with the next update.

## WELCOME RPG AND MINECRAFT FANS! 
Ever longed for more passive events and leveling systems in Minecraft? Look no further than this Collection. There are dungeons to explore, bounties to collect, and more... Enjoy as I bring more to this Collection in the future :) I am planning on adding some Vanilla+ features like new animations and more quality of life improvements!
